title: Billing and Posting Clerks
description: Compile, compute, and record billing, accounting, statistical, and other numerical data for billing purposes. Prepare billing invoices for services rendered or for delivery or shipment of goods.

tasks.text: Verify accuracy of billing data and revise any errors.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Resolve discrepancies in accounting records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare itemized statements, bills, or invoices and record amounts due for items purchased or services rendered.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate typing, adding, calculating, or billing machines.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Post stop-payment notices to prevent payment of protested checks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify signatures and required information on checks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records of invoices and support documents.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform bookkeeping work, including posting data or keeping other records concerning costs of goods or services or the shipment of goods.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Contact customers to obtain or relay account information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Route statements for mailing or over-the-counter delivery to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor equipment to ensure proper operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Fix minor problems, such as equipment jams, and notify repair personnel of major equipment problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review documents, such as purchase orders, sales tickets, charge slips, or hospital records, to compute fees or charges due.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Track accumulated hours and dollar amounts charged to each client job to calculate client fees for professional services, such as legal or accounting services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh envelopes containing statements to determine correct postage and affix postage, using stamps or metering equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult sources, such as rate books, manuals, or insurance company representatives, to determine specific charges or information such as rules, regulations, or government tax and tariff information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compare previously prepared bank statements with canceled checks and reconcile discrepancies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take orders for imprinted checks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Encode and cancel checks, using bank machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load machines with statements, cancelled checks, or envelopes to prepare statements for distribution to customers or stuff envelopes by hand.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute credit terms, discounts, shipment charges, or rates for goods or services to complete billing documents.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Update manuals when rates, rules, or regulations are amended.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review compiled data on operating costs and revenues to set rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Answer inquiries regarding rates, routing, or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile reports of cost factors, such as labor, production, storage, and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create billing documents, shipping labels, credit memorandums, or credit forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform general administrative tasks, such as answering telephones, scheduling appointments, and ordering supplies or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Return checks to customers or retrieve checks returned to customers in error, adjusting accounts and answering inquiries about errors as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
